response.overview: Ashes of Her Burnt Potential tells the story of Ivy, a young woman born into a world that had already tried to extinguish her mother's talent and dreams. Raised under the shadow of lost ambitions, she uncovers fragments of her mother's life and the societal pressures that shaped it. As Ivy navigates expectations and constraints, her path intersects with Lord Bannet and Berlie, two figures whose intentions and fates are intertwined with hers in unpredictable ways. Through moments of defiance, personal discovery, and delicate relationships, Ivy seeks to reclaim her voice and explore her own potential. The film examines generational trauma, resilience, and the ways creativity can survive even under suppression.
response.tagline: Everything she has... was burned before she was even born.
response.title: Ashes of Her Burnt Potential
